working_on: Audit-warrant gate for the Phase 5 knowledge graph production audit — small-scoped (15 cross-bridge edges + 5 within-domain edges + topology pass) with predeclared PROCEED/RESCOPE/CANCEL thresholds; output is engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_gate.md and a recommendation. Plan approved at end of pre-S-0081 exploration session.
outcome_summary: Phase 5 production audit warrant gate ran per approved plan. Sampled 15 of 71 cross-bridges + 5 of 72 epistemology within-domain edges with SEP-anchored review; ran topology pass (per-subdomain degree, top-10 hubs, three syllabus traces). Threshold rule: PROCEED. 8 substantive findings of 20 sampled (40%) — 4 historical-not-pedagogical cross-bridges (Greek Atomism / Scholasticism / Vienna Circle as sources), 1 reversed edge (propositional_attitude → proposition contradicts node summaries), 3 weak/questionable. Within-domain epistemology: 0 findings — defects concentrate in cross-bridges. Graph-wide patterns: 0/536 edges have evidence text (gate-feasible audit-system soft-warn proposal); free speech absent from political philosophy (coverage); discipline-label nodes (Political Philosophy / Metaphysics / Ontology) acting as syllabus-trace roots (granularity-mismatch). Top hub max degree 14 (Epistemic Justification) — well under named >40 threshold; syllabus chains 4-5 deep — well under named >25 threshold; topology PROCEED met by spirit not magnitudes. Forward inputs to master-plan pre-listed: 35% per-subdomain density (cross-bridge defect rate 47% triggers expansion rule), absent-target swap, 4 audit-system-input proposals, structural-reopen pre-flag for cross_domain_dependency / historical_influence activation. Deliverables: gate report at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_gate.md; minimal README index update for the new audit-warrant-gate report class; STATE.md / ENGINE_LOG.md updates. MemPalace: 4 calls (search + diary_read + diary_write + add_drawer); decision drawer filed for future-session retrieval. Validator: 31 checks, 0 hard-fails, 382 soft-warns (16 issue_collision annotated, 366 missing_rigor_score annotated).
declared_scope: Run the audit-warrant gate per the approved plan: sample 15 of 71 cross-bridge edges + 5 within-domain edges with SEP-anchored prompts, run a topology pass (degree distributions, top-10 hubs, syllabus-trace lengths for Gettier / modal realism / free speech), apply predeclared PROCEED/RESCOPE/CANCEL thresholds, and commit engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_gate.md with the recommendation. NON-GOALS: the 14-session production audit itself (authorized only on PROCEED), the audit master-plan / target-file authoring (only on PROCEED), Phase 6 master plan, OQ-DEC1 settlement, rigor calibration, any graph migration changes.

scope_delivery.explanation: Gate report authored with PROCEED recommendation, predeclared threshold rule applied, all named gate-session stopping criteria met (cross-bridge sample reviewed, within-domain sample reviewed, topology pass complete, threshold rule applied, gate report committed). README minimal-row update done; full multi-class restructure deferred to audit closeout per plan and Issue #26.
